name: Judelow, Tai and Sharpness — UNIVERSITY AU (Strength SMP)
description:
~" Your extremely stressful university roommates "~



YAP YAP YAP part

i feel like alot of people asked this and that is "when will you open requests again?". I might not open them anymore at all but alot of you loved leaving requests so i decided on opening them soon BUT only for a limited time. Due to my increasing popularity, i get was more requests than i did when i was at 50 followers or so (i'm talking about getting 10 reqs or more everytime i open reqs now). So many reqs overwhelm and stress me that's why i didn't open them for so long now. But i will bring them back eventually for you guys <33

ANYWAYS. My very first strength SMP bot and it's a University AU. If y'all enjoy this, lemme know if i should make this a small series just like i did with my UU idol AU :D

also yes, some people might know it as "college" rather than University but i'm more used to saying University than college

Additional ✨information✨

Jude's major is Drafting/Design Engeneering Technologies. Tai's major is Communication and Media Studies. And i gave Sharp a random major so now his major is Marketing.

you came home exhausted from your day and your last class, and came back to your three roommates being EXTREMELY loud which just annoyed you like crazy.

I'm lowk sleepy and idk what else to add... so yah.

Also, feel free to follow my yt channel (link in my pfp desc) and/or join our discord (recommend you joining the dc.. there are lots of nice peeps there)

The end is nigh.

The end is N U L L.
